# Mumbai Tech Events — Full Event Listing
# Tech events, hackathons, conferences, startup events & meetups
# in Mumbai, India · June 2026
# Website: https://mumbai-events.sagarjethi.com
# Author: Sagar Jethi (@sagarbjethi)
# Last updated: Thursday, June 11, 2026 (2026-06-11)

## Summary

27 tracked tech events. 22 upcoming as of 2026-06-11.
9 conferences · 9 meetups · 5 startup events.
18+ free to attend.

Organisations running events: The Linux Foundation, CNCF, OpenSearch Software
Foundation, Agentic AI Foundation, Microsoft, IBM, UBS Forums / Snowflake,
eChai Ventures.

---

## EVENTS BY DATE

### Mumbai Tech Mixer & Social
- ID: 3
- Date: Fridays · Jun 5–26
- Start: 2026-06-05
- Venue: British Brewing Company, Mathuradas Mill Compound, Lower Parel, Mumbai
- Time: 7:00 PM onwards
- Cost: Free
- Category: meetup
- Tags: Tech, AI, Data, Networking, Weekly
- Status: Past
- Description: A recurring free Friday-evening tech networking social for AI, data and IT professionals in Lower Parel. Runs every Friday through June (5, 12, 19, 26).
- Register: https://www.eventbrite.com/e/mumbai-tech-mixer-and-social-tech-ai-data-it-tickets-1987417417997
- Detail page: https://mumbai-events.sagarjethi.com/events/mumbai-tech-mixer-social

### JS Mumbai
- ID: 1
- Date: Jun 6
- Start: 2026-06-06
- Venue: ITM Institute of Design and Media, Andheri West, Mumbai
- Time: 10:00 AM onwards
- Cost: Free
- Category: conference
- Tags: JavaScript, Web, Frontend, AI Agents, Community
- Status: Past
- Description: Inaugural JavaScript community conference with talks on design, AI agents, freelancing and analytics, followed by networking. Free, first-come-first-served (waitlist when full).
- Register: https://luma.com/q86g8d3w
- Detail page: https://mumbai-events.sagarjethi.com/events/js-mumbai

### MumbAI AI Saturdays — Get Funded to Co-Work
- ID: 4
- Date: Saturdays · Jun 6–27
- Start: 2026-06-06
- Venue: BHIVE Platinum Plus, Inspire BKC, Bandra East, Mumbai
- Time: 6:00 PM – 8:00 PM
- Cost: Free (₹75 co-working day pass)
- Category: meetup
- Tags: AI, Builders, Co-working, Community, Weekly
- Status: Past
- Description: A grassroots AI builder co-working meetup every Saturday at BHIVE Inspire BKC, with a sponsorship mechanism that funds day passes. Runs every Saturday through June (6, 13, 20, 27).
- Register: https://www.eventbrite.com/e/mumbai-ai-saturdaysget-funded-to-co-work-adani-inspire-bkc-bhive-tickets-1983158010996
- Detail page: https://mumbai-events.sagarjethi.com/events/mumbai-ai-saturdays-get-funded-to-co-work

### The Shipyard
- ID: 17
- Date: Jun 6
- Start: 2026-06-06
- Venue: Zonko Labs, The Summit Business Bay, Gundavali, Andheri East, Mumbai
- Time: 4:00 PM – 8:00 PM
- Cost: Free (approval required)
- Category: hackathon
- Tags: Builders, AI Agents, Devtools, MCP, Infra
- Status: Past
- Description: A heads-down Saturday builder session by Zonko.ai — a small group ships AI agents, devtools, MCPs and infra together, with an optional show-and-tell at 7pm.
- Register: https://luma.com/u7gd6eyt
- Detail page: https://mumbai-events.sagarjethi.com/events/the-shipyard

### How Food Brands Scale Through Franchisees — Mumbai Edition (eChai)
- ID: 8
- Date: Jun 13
- Start: 2026-06-13
- Venue: DevX, 215 Atrium, J B Nagar, Andheri East, Mumbai
- Time: 11:00 AM – 1:00 PM
- Cost: Free
- Category: startup
- Tags: Startups, F&B, Franchising, eChai
- Status: Upcoming

### MCP Dev Summit Mumbai
- ID: 9
- Date: Jun 14–15
- Start: 2026-06-14  End: 2026-06-15
- Venue: Jio World Convention Centre, BKC, Mumbai
- Time: 2 days
- Cost: ₹11,500 (Academic ₹2,300)
- Category: conference
- Tags: AI Agents, MCP, Open Source, Linux Foundation, Open Source Week
- Status: Upcoming
- Description: A technical summit for developers building AI agents with the Model Context Protocol (MCP). Hosted by the Agentic AI Foundation as part of Open Source Week Mumbai.
- Register: https://events.linuxfoundation.org/mcp-dev-summit-mumbai/
- Website: https://events.linuxfoundation.org/mumbai-2026-events/
- Detail page: https://mumbai-events.sagarjethi.com/events/mcp-dev-summit-mumbai

### OpenSearchCon India 2026
- ID: 10
- Date: Jun 15–16
- Start: 2026-06-15  End: 2026-06-16
- Venue: Jio World Convention Centre, BKC, Mumbai
- Time: 2 days
- Cost: $149 / ₹13,400 (Academic $49)
- Category: conference
- Tags: OpenSearch, Search, Observability, Open Source, Open Source Week
- Status: Upcoming
- Description: The annual OpenSearch community conference on search, observability and security applications. Hosted by the OpenSearch Software Foundation alongside KubeCon + CloudNativeCon India.
- Register: https://events.linuxfoundation.org/opensearchcon-india/
- Website: https://events.linuxfoundation.org/mumbai-2026-events/

- Date: Jun 17
- Start: 2026-06-17

- Time: 12:30 PM onwards
- Cost: Free (separate registration required)
